name: Phoenix Rectangle Aluminum Dining Table - White - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, Seats 8, Cast Aluminum
description:
Seat your guests around a table that has plenty of space for them to enjoy a hearty meal and delightful conversations. Crafted from durable cast aluminum and finished with a graceful lattice pattern accented with floral carvings, our dining table offers both charming style and outstanding strength, making this a perfect addition to any outdoor space. This piece is complemented by elegantly curved legs and a convenient umbrella hole in the tabletop, allowing you to utilize this table in any weather.

TRADITIONAL INSPIRATION: With graceful curves and a classic lattice design, our dining table brings a regal style to any outdoor space. The intricate floral carvings emphasize the traditional elements of the piece, giving your home a sophisticated and ornate atmosphere.

ALUMINUM FRAME: This dining table is built with aluminum, creating a lightweight and stable frame. This material is rust-resistant which will further extend the life of your product.

FLORAL ACCENTS: Finished with simple yet eye-catching accents, this dining table emphasizes a traditional look. The tabletop offers a beautiful floral design bordering the edge, perfectly matching the elegant curves of the table legs.

UMBRELLA HOLE INCLUDED: This dining table includes a hole in the center of the tabletop for you to insert an outdoor umbrella of your choice.

DIMENSIONS: Choose an accessory that is the perfect size for you and your furniture. This rectangular dining table is 67.00” W x 37.50” D x 30.25” H. You will love how much your space can transform with the simple addition of this charming table.
